name: VR - Pop the Blocks
summary: Tap, pop, and blast your way to victory! In VR Pop the Blocks, you enter a vibrant world of colorful puzzles where quick thinking and strategy are your best tools. Use your hands to tap matching clusters and trigger satisfying explosions in a full 3D environment. It is a relaxing yet fast paced challenge that is easy to pick up but hard to put down. Can you clear the grid and become the ultimate block popper?
